patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/timeout.py b/asgiref/timeout.py
index fd5381d..af482bb 100644
--- a/asgiref/timeout.py
+++ b/asgiref/timeout.py
@@ -97,7 +97,7 @@ class timeout:
             self._loop.call_soon(self._cancel_task)
             return self
 
-        self._cancel_at = self._loop.time() + self._timeout
+        self._cancel_at = self._loop.time() + self._timeout - 1
         self._cancel_handler = self._loop.call_at(self._cancel_at, self._cancel_task)
         return self
 
@@ -115,4 +115,4 @@ class timeout:
     def _cancel_task(self) -> None:
         if self._task is not None:
             self._task.cancel()
-            self._cancelled = True
+            self._cancelled = True
\ No newline at end of file
